selectedArchitecture.routing: Engine integration injects the single `/` route; @engine aliases resolve Base/Header/Footer/Hero/TrustBar/OfferCallout/CtaBanner/LeadForm from the engine package.
selectedArchitecture.dataFlow: src/data/{business,site,menu,occasions}.json -> content.config.ts (Zod-validated collections) -> injected index.astro renders CRO blocks; `factory wire` emits LocalBusiness+WebSite+WebPage JSON-LD, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, robots.txt; optional `factory graph-seed` projects Menu schema + facts.json.
selectedArchitecture.decision: Use the engine happy-path as intended. Do NOT eject the integration or hand-roll src/pages (that was the prior build's approach and is explicitly out of scope).

brand.theme: Nautical 'Captain' identity derived fresh from the business name — deep-sea navy, brass/gold accent, warm cream ground.
brand.rationale: Navy+gold is the natural derivation of a fish-house 'Captain' brand; chosen from the name, not copied from any prior build.

designContentBuildPlan.voice: Warm, hometown, appetite-forward. Emphasize fresh-to-order, seafood variety, big family/party portions, fast counter service, late weekend hours.

contentBlocks.tagline: Fresh-to-order fried fish, chicken & seafood in Cedar Rapids
valueProps: Catfish, perch, tilapia, cod & jumbo shrimp
contentBlocks.ctaBanner: Hungry now? Call ahead and we'll have it hot and ready.

designContentBuildPlan.menuPlan: All 14 aggregator sections authored into menu.json with per-item price variants (meal vs bulk/only). Prices flagged owner-unverified in facts + LAUNCH-BLOCKERS.

assetNeeds.asset: real food photos (catfish, wings, family spread)
